title: Paracaryum intermedium
taxonomy: Paracaryum intermedium is classified within the family Brassicaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Paracaryum, which is a small group of flowering plants. It belongs to the order Brassicales and the class Magnoliopsida. The family Brassicaceae is commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family, and includes a wide variety of species. Paracaryum intermedium is an annual or biennial plant, adding to its unique characteristics within the Brassicaceae family.

Further research is needed to fully understand its potential medicinal applications.
